wiki.summary: In “Nosferatu,” Che returns to a loud and aggressive delivery. Lyrically, he raps about drug use, fashion, high luxury, and emotional isolation, giving the track a detached and intense tone. The music video for “Nosferatu” was released on the same day as its release, at 9:00 PM EST. It was released as part of a two-in-one video alongside “Tell U Sum.” Read more on Last.fm.
